Findings.Title: Internet-exposed management port on NSG
Findings.Remediation: Restrict inbound access to JIT or approved source ranges.

Findings.Title: Service Principal has excessive permissions
Findings.Detail: Service principal app-prod-api has Owner role on subscription prod-001.
Findings.Remediation: Apply least-privilege principle. Use Contributor or custom role instead.

Findings.Title: Privileged role assignment without MFA
Findings.Detail: User admin@example.com has Global Administrator role but MFA is not enforced.
Findings.Remediation: Enable per-user MFA or Conditional Access requiring MFA for admin roles.

Findings.Title: AWS Access Key hardcoded in repository
Findings.Detail: Found AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID in file scripts/deploy.sh at line 42.
Findings.Remediation: Rotate the exposed credential immediately. Use GitHub Secrets or Azure Key Vault.

Findings.Title: Container image has critical vulnerabilities
Findings.Remediation: Update base image to latest patched version. Scan images in CI.
